name_en: Details, just snap away! Imported aged material from original channels.
name_cn:
Details, just snap away! Imported aged material from original channels.
 The popularity of shoulder bags has been unstoppable these past two years! People's attitude towards shoulder bags has shifted from initial resistance to confusion, and finally to pure love! For a bag style to truly become popular, it must not only be stylish but also rare in that it suits everyone; most girls can instantly elevate their stylishness and temperament when carrying it.
size:23*14*7
